feed.title: Dispatch — Kevin Lee
feed.subtitle: A personal letter to friends and family. No Substack, no tracking.

entry.title: An Interlude: Clean Pain
entry.summary: On agape, Beef Season 2, and learning the difference between the pain you stay for and the pain you leave.

entry.title: Dispatch 007: Leave
entry.summary: First PTO from Paramount. Three generations, one rental car, Korea 0–1 Mexico at Estadio Akron — frustrating score, unforgettable trip.

entry.title: Dispatch 006: Us
entry.summary: Merger fever, a promotion I forgot to celebrate, Claude Fable 5, a mystery gift in the mail, Steve-O at Pride, and a Korean relay that broke me — Dispatch 006, shorter and meaner.

entry.title: Dispatch 005: Margin
entry.summary: A long weekend — a Friday screening on the Paramount lot with Justin (who lives in Frogtown and was not happy about parking), a Sunday that started in a church courtyard and ended on a sandy ridge above Big Bear, and a Monday that refused to put on real pants.

entry.title: Dispatch 004: Open House
entry.summary: A receipt of a few weeks. Friends flew in, a cousin graduated from USC, Kobe stole a snack. Itemized accordingly.

entry.title: Dispatch 003: Field of Daisies
entry.summary: Youbin's H1B, Kobe back from Germany, first 1:1s as a manager, and Justin Bieber crashing Coachella. Flip your phone.

entry.title: Dispatch 002: Spring on the Mountain
entry.summary: Closing out ski season at Mammoth, producing at Paramount, free furniture from London, and Dylan's first visit.

entry.title: Dispatch 001: Week One in LA
entry.summary: First week at Paramount, apartment hunting in Hollywood, and film photos from the drive down.
